_doc: Manual overrides for wikilink slugs that don't directly match a graph id. The note parser tries direct match in priority order (note:, source:, chapter:, claim:, concept:, mechanism:, question:, case:, tradition:) before falling back here. Add entries when build emits 'unresolved wikilink' warnings — fix by either pointing the slug at an existing id, or by adding a Source/Note/Concept node for the referenced thing.
